# Decker AI Strategy Builder — Documentation Index

Use this file to discover available pages before exploring further.

## Documentation

- README.md — Project overview, Story, Quick Start, Achievements, **서비스 뒷단 구조(핵심 파이프라인)**
- docs/quickstart.md — 3-step guide, Telegram/Slack setup, usage
- docs/api-guide.md — **Public API (실제 사용 가능)**: GET /signals, /strategy, POST /signals/push
- docs/architecture.md — **서비스 뒷단 구조**, 핵심 파이프라인 (Market Data→Label→State→Signal→LLM Reasoner)
- docs/roadmap.md — Completed, in progress, planned
- operation_rules/RULES.yaml — Operation rules (progress_min, timeframe, risk)
- operation_rules/PATCHNOTES.md — Version history
- samples/signal-push-strategy.sh — **실행 가능**: 시그널 등록 → 전략 조회 curl 2단계

## Links

- Website: https://decker-ai.com
- Telegram: https://t.me/deckerclawbot
- API Docs: https://api.decker-ai.com/docs
